summary: P2 Features Testing - Badge counts API working, team dashboards load with minor API path issues, SEO meta tags implemented correctly

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist - Finance dashboard calls this but gets 404. Actual endpoint may be /api/payments
Endpoint does not exist - Finance/Marketing dashboards call this but get 404. Actual endpoint is /api/leads

integration_issues.issue: Calls /api/admin/payments and /api/admin/leads which return 404. Dashboard shows 0 for revenue/payments/won deals. Handles errors gracefully but data is missing.
Calls /api/admin/leads which returns 404. Dashboard shows 0 for Total Enquiries and no data for Top Lead Sources/Top Cities charts.

backend_badge_counts_admin.detail: GET /api/team/badge-counts returns {Users: 11, Venues: 0, Client Cases: 0} for admin

backend_badge_counts_hr.detail: GET /api/team/badge-counts returns {Staff Verification: 11} for HR role

backend_badge_counts_vam.detail: GET /api/team/badge-counts returns {Review Queue: 0} for VAM role

frontend_admin_sidebar_badge.detail: Admin sidebar shows red badge '11' on 'Users' nav item (data-testid='badge-users')

frontend_hr_sidebar_badge.detail: HR sidebar shows red badge '11' on 'Staff Verification' nav item

frontend_finance_dashboard.detail: Dashboard loads at /team/finance/dashboard with correct structure (4 stats + Recent Payments). Stats show 0 due to API 404 errors but UI renders correctly.

frontend_operations_dashboard.detail: Dashboard loads with Platform Overview (80 Live Venues, 170 Total Leads, 92 Team Members) and Venue Onboarding Pipeline (7 total, 5 drafts, 1 approved)

frontend_marketing_dashboard.detail: Dashboard loads with partial data (Listed Venues: 80, Active Cities: 9). Total Enquiries shows 0 and charts show 'No data' due to /api/admin/leads 404.

seo_landing_page.detail: Title: 'Premium Venue Marketplace | VenuLoQ', OG tags and Twitter card present

seo_search_page_city.detail: Title dynamically includes city: 'Venues in Delhi | VenuLoQ', meta description includes city name

seo_venue_detail_page.detail: Title includes venue name, JSON-LD @type:EventVenue present with name, address, maximumAttendeeCapacity

action_items: Fix Finance Dashboard API calls: Change '/admin/payments' to '/payments' and '/admin/leads' to '/leads'
Fix Marketing Dashboard API call: Change '/admin/leads' to '/leads'
critical_code_review_comments: FinanceDashboard.js line 23-25: Uses incorrect API paths '/admin/payments' and '/admin/leads' - these endpoints don't exist. Should use '/payments' and '/leads'
MarketingDashboard.js line 19: Uses incorrect API path '/admin/leads' - should use '/leads'

success_rate.backend: 83% - 10/12 tests passed (2 failed are testing wrong endpoint paths)
success_rate.frontend: 80% - All 6 major features working but 2 dashboards have incomplete data

seed_data_creation: No seed data created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features tested. Badge counts API (/api/team/badge-counts) works correctly for all roles. SEO meta tags working on Landing, Search, and Venue Detail pages. Finance and Marketing dashboards have API path issues - they call /api/admin/payments and /api/admin/leads which don't exist. Correct endpoints are /api/payments and /api/leads. Operations dashboard works fully. Badge polling every 30s is implemented in DashboardLayout.js.
